---
name: Deferment (Manual Markdown)
about: Track work that is intentionally deferred to a later phase or later implementation window using the classic markdown template flow.
title: "Deferment: <short summary>"
labels: "implementation-issue, issue-type: deferment"
---

## Template Content

### Summary

Brief implementation-purpose statement of the deferred work.

### Created phase

Phase N

### Source

Checklist step, review, workflow, or developer source.

### Scheduled target

Target phase or implementation window.

### Priority

Low | Medium | High | Critical

### Notes

Extra context that should stay visible in the index.

### Rationale and context

Explain why this work is being deferred now.

### Impact

Impact on timeline, implementation order, or users.

### Implementation notes

Technical constraints, design notes, or related follow-up information.

### Acceptance / closing criteria

What must happen before this can be closed.
